name: @netcracker/qubership-apihub-apispec-view
description: Web Component to represent various API-specifications as a human-readable document

scripts.screenshot-test:ci: start-server-and-test development:local-server:static http://localhost:9009 "npm run generate-tests && jest --maxWorkers 4 -c .config/it/it-test.jest.config.js"
scripts.screenshot-test:docker: start-server-and-test development:local-server:static http://localhost:9009 "npm run generate-tests && jest --maxWorkers 4 -c .config/it/it-test-docker.jest.config.js"
scripts.regenerate-screenshots:ci: start-server-and-test development:local-server:static http://localhost:9009 "npm run generate-tests && jest --maxWorkers 4 --updateSnapshot -c .config/it/it-test.jest.config.js"
scripts.regenerate-screenshots:docker: start-server-and-test development:local-server:static http://localhost:9009 "npm run generate-tests && jest --maxWorkers 4 --updateSnapshot -c .config/it/it-test-docker.jest.config.js"
